001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.isEmpty;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestOpAnnotation.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.RestPartType.*;
026
027import java.lang.reflect.*;
028import java.util.*;
029import java.util.function.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.Swagger;
032import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.Items;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.conversion.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.ParameterInfo;
040import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
041import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
042import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
043import org.apache.juneau.http.Contact;
044import org.apache.juneau.http.License;
045import org.apache.juneau.http.Tag;
046import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
047import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
048import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
049import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
050import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
051import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
052import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
053import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
054import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
055import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
056import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart.*;
057import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.util.*;
058
059import jakarta.servlet.*;
060
061/**
062 * A single session of generating a Swagger document.
063 *
064 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
065 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
066 * </ul>
067 */
068@SuppressWarnings({
069   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
070   "java:S1168",    // Swagger/OpenAPI spec: null = omit field (e.g. parseList, parseMap, nullIfEmpty, toMap, firstNonEmpty)
071   "java:S115"      // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention (e.g., SWAGGER_paths)
072})
073public class BasicSwaggerProviderSession {
074
075   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(BasicSwaggerProviderSession.class);
076
077   // Swagger JSON property name constants
078   private static final String SWAGGER_allOf = "allOf";
079   private static final String SWAGGER_body = "body";
080   private static final String SWAGGER_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
081   private static final String SWAGGER_consumes = "consumes";
082   private static final String SWAGGER_contact = "contact";
083   private static final String SWAGGER_default = "default";
084   private static final String SWAGGER_definitions = "definitions";
085   private static final String SWAGGER_deprecated = "deprecated";
086   private static final String SWAGGER_description = "description";
087   private static final String SWAGGER_discriminator = "discriminator";
088   private static final String SWAGGER_email = "email";
089   private static final String SWAGGER_enum = "enum";
090   private static final String SWAGGER_example = "example";
091   private static final String SWAGGER_examples = "examples";
092   private static final String SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
093   private static final String SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
094   private static final String SWAGGER_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
095   private static final String SWAGGER_format = "format";
096   private static final String SWAGGER_headers = "headers";
097   private static final String SWAGGER_ignore = "ignore";
098   private static final String SWAGGER_in = "in";
099   private static final String SWAGGER_info = "info";
100   private static final String SWAGGER_items = "items";
101   private static final String SWAGGER_license = "license";
102   private static final String SWAGGER_maxItems = "maxItems";
103   private static final String SWAGGER_maxLength = "maxLength";
104   private static final String SWAGGER_maxProperties = "maxProperties";
105   private static final String SWAGGER_maximum = "maximum";
106   private static final String SWAGGER_minItems = "minItems";
107   private static final String SWAGGER_minLength = "minLength";
108   private static final String SWAGGER_minProperties = "minProperties";
109   private static final String SWAGGER_minimum = "minimum";
110   private static final String SWAGGER_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
111   private static final String SWAGGER_name = "name";
112   private static final String SWAGGER_object = "object";
113   private static final String SWAGGER_operationId = "operationId";
114   private static final String SWAGGER_parameters = "parameters";
115   private static final String SWAGGER_paths = "paths";
116   private static final String SWAGGER_pattern = "pattern";
117   private static final String SWAGGER_produces = "produces";
118   private static final String SWAGGER_readOnly = "readOnly";
119   private static final String SWAGGER_required = "required";
120   private static final String SWAGGER_responses = "responses";
121   private static final String SWAGGER_schema = "schema";
122   private static final String SWAGGER_schemes = "schemes";
123   private static final String SWAGGER_siteName = "siteName";
124   private static final String SWAGGER_summary = "summary";
125   private static final String SWAGGER_tags = "tags";
126   private static final String SWAGGER_termsOfService = "termsOfService";
127   private static final String SWAGGER_title = "title";
128   private static final String SWAGGER_true = "true";
129   private static final String SWAGGER_type = "type";
130   private static final String SWAGGER_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
131   private static final String SWAGGER_url = "url";
132   private static final String SWAGGER_version = "version";
133   private static final String SWAGGER_xml = "xml";
134   private static final String SWAGGER_$ref = "$ref";
135
136   // JSON-Schema extension property name constants (x-prefixed)
137   private static final String JSONSCHEMA_x_discriminator = "x-discriminator";
138   private static final String JSONSCHEMA_x_example = "x-example";
139   private static final String JSONSCHEMA_x_externalDocs = "x-externalDocs";
140   private static final String JSONSCHEMA_x_readOnly = "x-readOnly";
141   private static final String JSONSCHEMA_x_xml = "x-xml";
142
143   // Other constant values
144   private static final String CONST_200 = "200";
145   private static final String CONST_IGNORE = "IGNORE";
146   private static final String CONST_value = "_value";
147
148   private static Set<Integer> getCodes(List<StatusCode> la, Integer def) {
149      var codes = new TreeSet<Integer>();
150      for (var a : la) {
151         for (var i : a.value())
152            codes.add(i);
153      }
154      if (codes.isEmpty() && nn(def))
155         codes.add(def);
156      return codes;
157   }
158
159   private static MarshalledMap newMap(MarshalledMap om) {
160      if (om == null)
161         return new Json5Map();
162      return om.modifiable();
163   }
164
165   private static MarshalledList nullIfEmpty(MarshalledList l) {
166      return ie(l) ? null : l;
167   }
168
169   private static MarshalledMap nullIfEmpty(MarshalledMap m) {
170      return ie(m) ? null : m;
171   }
172
173   static String joinnl(String[]...s) {
174      for (var ss : s) {
175         if (ss.length != 0)
176            return StringUtils.joinnl(ss).trim();
177      }
178      return "";
179   }
180
181   private final RestContext context;
182   private final Class<?> c;
183   private final ClassInfo rci;
184   private final FileFinder ff;
185
186   private final Messages mb;
187
188   private final VarResolverSession vr;
189   private final JsonParser jp = Json5Parser.create().ignoreUnknownBeanProperties().build();
190
191   private final JsonSchemaGeneratorSession js;
192
193   private final Locale locale;
194
195   /**
196    * Constructor.
197    *
198    * @param context The context of the REST object we're generating Swagger about.
199    * @param locale The language of the swagger we're asking for.
200    * @param ff The file finder to use for finding JSON files.
201    * @param messages The messages to use for finding localized strings.
202    * @param vr The variable resolver to use for resolving variables in the swagger.
203    * @param js The JSON-schema generator to use for stuff like examples.
204    */
205   public BasicSwaggerProviderSession(RestContext context, Locale locale, FileFinder ff, Messages messages, VarResolverSession vr, JsonSchemaGeneratorSession js) {
206      this.context = context;
207      this.c = context.getResourceClass();
208      this.rci = ClassInfo.of(c);
209      this.ff = ff;
210      this.mb = messages;
211      this.vr = vr;
212      this.js = js;
213      this.locale = locale;
214   }
215
216   /**
217    * Generates the swagger.
218    *
219    * @return A new {@link Swagger} object.
220    * @throws Exception If an error occurred producing the Swagger.
221    */
222   @SuppressWarnings({
223      "java:S3776", // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
224      "java:S6541", // Single-threaded context; synchronization unnecessary
225      "java:S112", // Generic exception thrown; acceptable for framework/lifecycle methods
226   })
227   public Swagger getSwagger() throws Exception {
228      // @formatter:off
229
230      var is = ff.getStream(rci.getNameSimple() + ".json", locale).orElse(null);
231
232      var ap = this.context.getMarshallingContext().getAnnotationProvider();
233
234      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
235      Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Shorts::ine;
236      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Shorts::ine;
237
238      // Load swagger JSON from classpath.
239      var omSwagger = Json5.DEFAULT.read(is, Json5Map.class);
240      if (omSwagger == null)
241         omSwagger = new Json5Map();
242
243      // Combine it with @Rest(swagger)
244      var restAnnotations = rstream(ap.find(Rest.class, rci)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
245
246      for (var rr : restAnnotations) {
247
248         var sInfo = omSwagger.getMap(SWAGGER_info, true);
249
250         sInfo
251            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_title,
252               firstNonEmpty(
253                  sInfo.getString(SWAGGER_title),
254                  resolve(rr.title())
255               )
256            )
257            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description,
258               firstNonEmpty(
259                  sInfo.getString(SWAGGER_description),
260                  resolve(rr.description())
261               )
262            )
263            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_siteName,
264               firstNonEmpty(
265                  sInfo.getString(SWAGGER_siteName),
266                  resolve(rr.siteName())
267               )
268            );
269
270         var r = rr.swagger();
271
272         omSwagger.append(parseMap(r.value(), "@Swagger(value) on class {0}", c));
273
274         if (! SwaggerAnnotation.empty(r)) {
275            var info = omSwagger.getMap(SWAGGER_info, true);
276
277            info
278               .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_title, resolve(r.title()))
279               .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(r.description()))
280               .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_version, resolve(r.version()))
281               .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_termsOfService, resolve(r.termsOfService()))
282               .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_contact,
283                  merge(
284                     info.getMap(SWAGGER_contact),
285                     toMap(r.contact())
286                  )
287               )
288               .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_license,
289                  merge(
290                     info.getMap(SWAGGER_license),
291                     toMap(r.license())
292                  )
293               );
294         }
295
296         omSwagger
297            .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_externalDocs,
298               merge(
299                  omSwagger.getMap(SWAGGER_externalDocs),
300                  toMap(r.externalDocs())
301               )
302            )
303            .appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_tags,
304               merge(
305                  omSwagger.getList(SWAGGER_tags),
306                  toList(r.tags())
307               )
308            );
309      }
310
311      omSwagger.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_externalDocs, parseMap(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_externalDocs), "Messages/externalDocs on class {0}", c));
312
313      var info = omSwagger.getMap(SWAGGER_info, true);
314
315      info
316         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_title, resolve(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_title)))
317         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_description)))
318         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_version, resolve(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_version)))
319         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_termsOfService, resolve(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_termsOfService)))
320         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_contact, parseMap(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_contact), "Messages/contact on class {0}", c))
321         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_license, parseMap(mb.findFirstString(SWAGGER_license), "Messages/license on class {0}", c));
322
323      if (info.isEmpty())
324         omSwagger.remove(SWAGGER_info);
325
326      var produces = omSwagger.getList(SWAGGER_produces, true);
327      var consumes = omSwagger.getList(SWAGGER_consumes, true);
328
329      if (consumes.isEmpty())
330         consumes.addAll(context.getConsumes());
331      if (produces.isEmpty())
332         produces.addAll(context.getProduces());
333
334      Map<String,Json5Map> tagMap = map();
335      if (omSwagger.containsKey(SWAGGER_tags)) {
336         for (var om : omSwagger.getList(SWAGGER_tags).elements(Json5Map.class)) {
337            String name = om.getString(SWAGGER_name);
338            if (name == null)
339               throw new SwaggerException(null, "Tag definition found without name in swagger JSON.");
340            tagMap.put(name, om);
341         }
342      }
343
344      var s = mb.findFirstString("tags");
345      if (nn(s)) {
346         for (var m : parseListOrCdl(s, "Messages/tags on class {0}", c).elements(Json5Map.class)) {
347            var name = m.getString(SWAGGER_name);
348            if (name == null)
349               throw new SwaggerException(null, "Tag definition found without name in resource bundle on class {0}", c);
350            if (tagMap.containsKey(name))
351               tagMap.get(name).putAll(m);
352            else
353               tagMap.put(name, m);
354         }
355      }
356
357      // Load our existing bean definitions into our session.
358      var definitions = omSwagger.getMap(SWAGGER_definitions, true);
359      for (var defId : definitions.keySet())
360         js.addBeanDef(defId, new JsonMap(definitions.getMap(defId)));
361
362      // Iterate through all the @RestOp methods.
363      for (var sm : context.getRestOperations().getOpContexts()) {
364
365         var bs = sm.getMarshallingContext().getSession();
366
367         var m = sm.getJavaMethod();
368         var mi = MethodInfo.of(m);
369         var al = rstream(ap.find(mi)).filter(REST_OP_GROUP).toList();
370         var mn = m.getName();
371
372         // Honor @OpSwagger(ignore=true) — skip the operation entirely so neither the path nor the
373         // HTTP-method entry shows up in the generated spec. Done before getOperation(...) is called
374         // because that method has the side effect of inserting empty entries via computeIfAbsent.
375         var msValue = Holder.<OpSwagger>empty();
376         al.forEach(ai -> ai.getValue(OpSwagger.class, "swagger").filter(OpSwaggerAnnotation::notEmpty).ifPresent(msValue::set));
377         var ms = msValue.orElseGet(() -> OpSwaggerAnnotation.create().build());
378         if (ms.ignore())
379            continue;
380
381         // Get the operation from the existing swagger so far.
382         var op = getOperation(omSwagger, sm.getPathPattern(), sm.getHttpMethod().toLowerCase());
383
384         op.append(parseMap(ms.value(), "@OpSwagger(value) on class {0} method {1}", c, m));
385         op.appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_operationId,
386            firstNonEmpty(
387               resolve(ms.operationId()),
388               op.getString(SWAGGER_operationId),
389               mn
390            )
391         );
392
393      var summaryValue = Holder.<String>empty();
394      al.forEach(ai -> ai.getValue(String.class, SWAGGER_summary).filter(NOT_EMPTY).ifPresent(summaryValue::set));
395      op.appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_summary,
396         firstNonEmpty(
397            resolve(ms.summary()),
398            resolve(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".summary")),
399            op.getString(SWAGGER_summary),
400            resolve(summaryValue.orElse(null))
401         )
402      );
403
404      var descriptionValue = Holder.<String[]>empty();
405      al.forEach(ai -> ai.getValue(String[].class, SWAGGER_description).filter(x -> x.length > 0).ifPresent(descriptionValue::set));
406      op.appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description,
407         firstNonEmpty(
408            resolve(ms.description()),
409            resolve(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".description")),
410            op.getString(SWAGGER_description),
411            resolve(descriptionValue.orElse(new String[0]))
412         )
413      );
414         op.appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_deprecated,
415            firstNonEmpty(
416               resolve(ms.deprecated()),
417               (nn(m.getAnnotation(Deprecated.class)) || nn(ClassInfo.of(m.getDeclaringClass()).getAnnotations(Deprecated.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null))) ? SWAGGER_true : null
418            )
419         );
420         op.appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_tags,
421            merge(
422               parseListOrCdl(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".tags"), "Messages/tags on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
423               parseListOrCdl(ms.tags(), "@OpSwagger(tags) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
424            )
425         );
426         op.appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_schemes,
427            merge(
428               parseListOrCdl(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".schemes"), "Messages/schemes on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
429               parseListOrCdl(ms.schemes(), "@OpSwagger(schemes) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
430            )
431         );
432         op.appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_consumes,
433            firstNonEmpty(
434               parseListOrCdl(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".consumes"), "Messages/consumes on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
435               parseListOrCdl(ms.consumes(), "@OpSwagger(consumes) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
436            )
437         );
438         op.appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_produces,
439            firstNonEmpty(
440               parseListOrCdl(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".produces"), "Messages/produces on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
441               parseListOrCdl(ms.produces(), "@OpSwagger(produces) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
442            )
443         );
444         op.appendIf(nec, SWAGGER_parameters,
445            merge(
446               parseList(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".parameters"), "Messages/parameters on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
447               parseList(ms.parameters(), "@OpSwagger(parameters) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
448            )
449         );
450         op.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_responses,
451            merge(
452               parseMap(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".responses"), "Messages/responses on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
453               parseMap(ms.responses(), "@OpSwagger(responses) on class {0} method {1}", c, m)
454            )
455         );
456         op.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_externalDocs,
457            merge(
458               op.getMap(SWAGGER_externalDocs),
459               parseMap(mb.findFirstString(mn + ".externalDocs"), "Messages/externalDocs on class {0} method {1}", c, m),
460               toMap(ms.externalDocs())
461            )
462         );
463
464         if (op.containsKey(SWAGGER_tags))
465            for (var tag : op.getList(SWAGGER_tags).elements(String.class))
466               if (! tagMap.containsKey(tag))
467                  tagMap.put(tag, Json5Map.of(SWAGGER_name, tag));
468
469         var paramMap = new Json5Map();
470         if (op.containsKey(SWAGGER_parameters))
471            for (var param : op.getList(SWAGGER_parameters).elements(Json5Map.class))
472               paramMap.put(param.getString(SWAGGER_in) + '.' + (SWAGGER_body.equals(param.getString(SWAGGER_in)) ? SWAGGER_body : param.getString(SWAGGER_name)), param);
473
474         // Finally, look for parameters defined on method.
475         for (var mpi : mi.getParameters()) {
476
477            var pt = mpi.getParameterType();
478            var type = pt.innerType();
479
480            if (ap.has(Content.class, mpi)) {
481               var param = paramMap.getMap(BODY + ".body", true).append(SWAGGER_in, BODY);
482               var schema = getSchema(param.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs);
483               rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner()));
484               rstream(ap.find(Content.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner().schema()));
485               pushupSchemaFields(BODY, param, schema);
486               param.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, schema);
487               param.putIfAbsent(SWAGGER_required, SWAGGER_true);
488               addBodyExamples(sm, param, false, type, locale);
489
490            } else if (ap.has(Query.class, mpi)) {
491               var name = findAnnotationName(ap, Query.class, mpi).orElse(null);
492               var param = paramMap.getMap(QUERY + "." + name, true).append(SWAGGER_name, name).append(SWAGGER_in, QUERY);
493               rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner()));
494               rstream(ap.find(Query.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner().schema()));
495               pushupSchemaFields(QUERY, param, getSchema(param.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs));
496               addParamExample(sm, param, QUERY, type);
497
498            } else if (ap.has(FormData.class, mpi)) {
499               var name = findAnnotationName(ap, FormData.class, mpi).orElse(null);
500               var param = paramMap.getMap(FORM_DATA + "." + name, true).append(SWAGGER_name, name).append(SWAGGER_in, FORM_DATA);
501               rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner()));
502               rstream(ap.find(FormData.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner().schema()));
503               pushupSchemaFields(FORM_DATA, param, getSchema(param.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs));
504               addParamExample(sm, param, FORM_DATA, type);
505
506            } else if (ap.has(Header.class, mpi)) {
507               var name = findAnnotationName(ap, Header.class, mpi).orElse(null);
508               var param = paramMap.getMap(HEADER + "." + name, true).append(SWAGGER_name, name).append(SWAGGER_in, HEADER);
509               rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner()));
510               rstream(ap.find(Header.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner().schema()));
511               pushupSchemaFields(HEADER, param, getSchema(param.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs));
512               addParamExample(sm, param, HEADER, type);
513
514            } else if (ap.has(Path.class, mpi)) {
515               var name = findAnnotationName(ap, Path.class, mpi).orElse(null);
516               var param = paramMap.getMap(PATH + "." + name, true).append(SWAGGER_name, name).append(SWAGGER_in, PATH);
517               rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner()));
518               rstream(ap.find(Path.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(param, x.inner().schema()));
519               pushupSchemaFields(PATH, param, getSchema(param.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs));
520               addParamExample(sm, param, PATH, type);
521               param.putIfAbsent(SWAGGER_required, SWAGGER_true);
522            }
523         }
524
525         if (! paramMap.isEmpty())
526            op.put(SWAGGER_parameters, paramMap.values());
527
528         var responses = op.getMap(SWAGGER_responses, true);
529
530         for (var eci : mi.getExceptionTypes()) {
531            if (eci.hasAnnotation(Response.class)) {
532               var la = rstream(ap.find(Response.class, eci)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
533               var la2 = rstream(ap.find(StatusCode.class, eci)).map(x -> x.inner()).toList();
534               var codes = getCodes(la2, 500);
535               for (var a : la) {
536                  for (var code : codes) {
537                     var om = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true);
538                     merge(om, a);
539                     var schema = getSchema(om.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), m.getGenericReturnType(), bs);
540                     rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, eci)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner()));
541                     pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE, om, schema);
542                     om.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, schema);
543               }
544            }
545            var methods = eci.getAllMethods();
546            for (var i = methods.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
547               var ecmi = methods.get(i);
548               var a = ecmi.getAnnotations(Header.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
549                  if (a == null)
550                     a = ecmi.getReturnType().unwrap(Holder.class, Optional.class).getAnnotations(Header.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
551                  if (nn(a) && ! isMulti(a)) {
552                     var ha = a.name();
553                     for (var code : codes) {
554                        var header = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true).getMap(SWAGGER_headers, true).getMap(ha, true);
555                        rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, ecmi)).forEach(x -> merge(header, x.inner()));
556                        rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, ecmi.getReturnType().unwrap(Holder.class, Optional.class))).forEach(x -> merge(header, x.inner()));
557                        pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE_HEADER, header, getSchema(header.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), ecmi.getReturnType().unwrap(Holder.class, Optional.class).innerType(), bs));
558                     }
559                  }
560               }
561            }
562         }
563
564         if (mi.hasAnnotation(Response.class) || mi.getReturnType().unwrap(Holder.class, Optional.class).hasAnnotation(Response.class)) {
565            var la = rstream(ap.find(Response.class, mi)).map(x -> x.inner()).toList();
566            var la2 = rstream(ap.find(StatusCode.class, mi)).map(x -> x.inner()).toList();
567            var codes = getCodes(la2, 200);
568            for (var a : la) {
569               for (var code : codes) {
570                  var om = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true);
571                  merge(om, a);
572                  var schema = getSchema(om.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), m.getGenericReturnType(), bs);
573                  rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mi)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner()));
574                  pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE, om, schema);
575                  om.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, schema);
576                  addBodyExamples(sm, om, true, m.getGenericReturnType(), locale);
577               }
578         }
579         if (mi.getReturnType().hasAnnotation(Response.class)) {
580            var methods = mi.getReturnType().getAllMethods();
581            for (var i = methods.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
582               var ecmi = methods.get(i);
583                  if (ecmi.hasAnnotation(Header.class)) {
584                     var a = ecmi.getAnnotations(Header.class).findFirst().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).orElse(null);
585                     var ha = a.name();
586                     if (! isMulti(a)) {
587                        for (var code : codes) {
588                           var header = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true).getMap(SWAGGER_headers, true).getMap(ha, true);
589                           rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, ecmi)).forEach(x -> merge(header, x.inner()));
590                           rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, ecmi.getReturnType().unwrap(Holder.class, Optional.class))).forEach(x -> merge(header, x.inner()));
591                           merge(header, a.schema());
592                           pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE_HEADER, header, getSchema(header, ecmi.getReturnType().innerType(), bs));
593                        }
594                     }
595                  }
596               }
597            }
598         } else if (m.getGenericReturnType() != void.class) {
599            var om = responses.getMap(CONST_200, true);
600            var pt2 = ClassInfo.of(m.getGenericReturnType());
601            var schema = getSchema(om.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), m.getGenericReturnType(), bs);
602            rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, pt2)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner()));
603            pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE, om, schema);
604            om.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, schema);
605            addBodyExamples(sm, om, true, m.getGenericReturnType(), locale);
606         }
607
608         // Finally, look for Value @Header parameters defined on method.
609         for (var mpi : mi.getParameters()) {
610
611            var pt = mpi.getParameterType();
612
613            if (pt.is(Holder.class) && (ap.has(Header.class, mpi))) {
614               var la = rstream(ap.find(Header.class, mpi)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
615               var la2 = rstream(ap.find(StatusCode.class, mpi)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
616               var codes = getCodes(la2, 200);
617               var name = findAnnotationName(ap, Header.class, mpi).orElse(null);
618               var type = Holder.unwrap(mpi.getParameterType().innerType());
619               for (var a : la) {
620                  if (! isMulti(a)) {
621                     for (var code : codes) {
622                        var header = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true).getMap(SWAGGER_headers, true).getMap(name, true);
623                        rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(header, x.inner()));
624                        merge(header, a.schema());
625                        pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE_HEADER, header, getSchema(header, type, bs));
626                     }
627                  }
628               }
629
630            } else if (ap.has(Response.class, mpi)) {
631               var la = rstream(ap.find(Response.class, mpi)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
632               var la2 = rstream(ap.find(StatusCode.class, mpi)).map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList();
633               var codes = getCodes(la2, 200);
634               var type = Holder.unwrap(mpi.getParameterType().innerType());
635               for (var a : la) {
636                  for (var code : codes) {
637                     var om = responses.getMap(String.valueOf(code), true);
638                     merge(om, a);
639                     var schema = getSchema(om.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), type, bs);
640                     rstream(ap.find(Schema.class, mpi)).forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.inner()));
641                     la.forEach(x -> merge(schema, x.schema()));
642                     pushupSchemaFields(RESPONSE, om, schema);
643                     om.appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, schema);
644                  }
645               }
646            }
647         }
648
649         // Add default response descriptions.
650         for (var e : responses.entrySet()) {
651            var key = e.getKey();
652            var val = responses.getMap(key);
653            if (isDecimal(key))
654               val.appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, RestUtils.getHttpResponseText(Integer.parseInt(key)));
655         }
656
657         if (responses.isEmpty())
658            op.remove(SWAGGER_responses);
659         else
660            op.put(SWAGGER_responses, new TreeMap<>(responses));
661
662         if (! op.containsKey(SWAGGER_consumes)) {
663            var mConsumes = sm.getSupportedContentTypes();
664            if (! mConsumes.equals(consumes))
665               op.put(SWAGGER_consumes, mConsumes);
666         }
667
668         if (! op.containsKey(SWAGGER_produces)) {
669            var mProduces = sm.getSupportedAcceptTypes();
670            if (! mProduces.equals(produces))
671               op.put(SWAGGER_produces, mProduces);
672         }
673      }
674
675      if (nn(js.getBeanDefs()))
676         for (var e : js.getBeanDefs().entrySet())
677            definitions.put(e.getKey(), fixSwaggerExtensions(e.getValue()));
678
679      if (definitions.isEmpty())
680         omSwagger.remove(SWAGGER_definitions);
681
682      if (! tagMap.isEmpty())
683         omSwagger.put(SWAGGER_tags, tagMap.values());
684
685      if (consumes.isEmpty())
686         omSwagger.remove(SWAGGER_consumes);
687      if (produces.isEmpty())
688         omSwagger.remove(SWAGGER_produces);
689
690      try {
691         var swaggerJson = Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE.toString(omSwagger);
692         return jp.parse(swaggerJson, Swagger.class);
693      } catch (Exception e) {
694         throw new ServletException("Error detected in swagger.", e);
695      }
696      // @formatter:on
697   }
698
699   @SuppressWarnings({
700      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for example generation logic
701      "java:S112"   // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
702   })
703   private void addBodyExamples(RestOpContext sm, MarshalledMap piri, boolean response, Type type, Locale locale) throws Exception {
704
705      var sex = piri.getString(SWAGGER_example);
706
707      if (sex == null) {
708         var schema = resolveRef(piri.getMap(SWAGGER_schema));
709         if (nn(schema))
710            sex = schema.getString(SWAGGER_example, schema.getString(SWAGGER_example));
711      }
712
713      if (isEmpty(sex))
714         return;
715
716      Object example = null;
717      if (isProbablyJson(sex)) {
718         example = jp.parse(sex, type);
719      } else {
720         var cm = js.getClassMeta(type);
721         if (cm.hasStringMutater()) {
722            example = BasicConverter.INSTANCE.to(sex, cm.inner());
723         }
724      }
725
726      var examplesKey = SWAGGER_examples;  // Parameters don't have an examples attribute.
727
728      var examples = piri.getMap(examplesKey);
729      if (examples == null)
730         examples = new Json5Map();
731
732      var mediaTypes = response ? sm.getSerializers().getSupportedMediaTypes() : sm.getParsers().getSupportedMediaTypes();
733
734      for (var mt : mediaTypes) {
735         if (mt != MediaType.HTML) {
736            var s2 = sm.getSerializers().getSerializer(mt).orElse(null);
737            if (nn(s2)) {
738               try {
739                  // @formatter:off
740                  var eVal = s2
741                     .createSession()
742                     .locale(locale)
743                     .mediaType(mt)
744                     .apply(WriterSerializerSession.Builder.class, x -> x.useWhitespace(true))
745                     .build()
746                     .serializeToString(example);
747                  // @formatter:on
748                  examples.put(s2.getPrimaryMediaType().toString(), eVal);
749               } catch (Exception e) {
750                  LOG.warning("Could not serialize to media type [{}]: {}", mt, localizedMessage(e));  // NOT DEBUG
751               }
752            }
753         }
754      }
755
756      if (! examples.isEmpty())
757         piri.put(examplesKey, examples);
758   }
759
760   @SuppressWarnings({
761      "java:S1172", // Parameter kept to match interface contract
762      "unused" // Eclipse: type parameter unused but kept for API consistency
763   })
764   private static void addParamExample(RestOpContext sm, MarshalledMap piri, RestPartType in, Type type) {
765
766      var s = piri.getString(SWAGGER_example);
767
768      if (isEmpty(s))
769         return;
770
771      var examples = piri.getMap(SWAGGER_examples);
772      if (examples == null)
773         examples = new Json5Map();
774
775      var paramName = piri.getString(SWAGGER_name);
776
777      if (in == QUERY)
778         s = "?" + urlEncodeLax(paramName) + "=" + urlEncodeLax(s);
779      else if (in == FORM_DATA)
780         s = paramName + "=" + s;
781      else if (in == HEADER)
782         s = paramName + ": " + s;
783      else if (in == PATH)
784         s = sm.getPathPattern().replace("{" + paramName + "}", urlEncodeLax(s));
785
786      examples.put(SWAGGER_example, s);
787
788      if (! examples.isEmpty())
789         piri.put(SWAGGER_examples, examples);
790   }
791
792   @SafeVarargs
793   private static final <T> T firstNonEmpty(T...t) {
794      for (var oo : t)
795         if (ine(oo))
796            return oo;
797      return null;
798   }
799
800   /**
801    * Replaces non-standard JSON-Schema attributes with standard Swagger attributes.
802    */
803   private static MarshalledMap fixSwaggerExtensions(MarshalledMap om) {
804      Predicate<Object> nn = Shorts::nn;
805      // @formatter:off
806      om
807         .appendIf(nn, SWAGGER_discriminator, om.remove(JSONSCHEMA_x_discriminator))
808         .appendIf(nn, SWAGGER_readOnly, om.remove(JSONSCHEMA_x_readOnly))
809         .appendIf(nn, SWAGGER_xml, om.remove(JSONSCHEMA_x_xml))
810         .appendIf(nn, SWAGGER_externalDocs, om.remove(JSONSCHEMA_x_externalDocs))
811         .appendIf(nn, SWAGGER_example, om.remove(JSONSCHEMA_x_example));
812      // @formatter:on
813      return nullIfEmpty(om);
814   }
815
816   private static MarshalledMap getOperation(MarshalledMap om, String path, String httpMethod) {
817      om = (MarshalledMap) om.computeIfAbsent(SWAGGER_paths, k -> new Json5Map());
818      om = (MarshalledMap) om.computeIfAbsent(path, k -> new Json5Map());
819      om.computeIfAbsent(httpMethod, k -> new Json5Map());
820      return (MarshalledMap) om.get(httpMethod);
821   }
822
823   @SuppressWarnings({
824      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
825   })
826   private MarshalledMap getSchema(MarshalledMap schema, Type type, MarshallingSession bs) throws Exception {
827
828      if (type == Swagger.class)
829         return Json5Map.create();
830
831      schema = newMap(schema);
832
833      var cm = bs.getClassMeta(type);
834
835      if (schema.is(SWAGGER_ignore, false))
836         return null;
837
838      if (schema.containsKey(SWAGGER_type) || schema.containsKey(SWAGGER_$ref))
839         return schema;
840
841      return fixSwaggerExtensions(schema.append(js.getSchema(cm)));
842   }
843
844   private static boolean isMulti(Header h) {
845      return "*".equals(h.name()) || "*".equals(h.value());
846   }
847
848   private static MarshalledList merge(MarshalledList...lists) {
849      var l = lists[0];
850      for (var i = 1; i < lists.length; i++) {
851         if (nn(lists[i])) {
852            if (l == null)
853               l = new Json5List();
854            l.addAll(lists[i]);
855         }
856      }
857      return l;
858   }
859
860   private static MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap...maps) {
861      var m = maps[0];
862      for (var i = 1; i < maps.length; i++) {
863         if (nn(maps[i])) {
864            if (m == null)
865               m = new Json5Map();
866            m.putAll(maps[i]);
867         }
868      }
869      return m;
870   }
871
872   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, ExternalDocs a) {
873      if (ExternalDocsAnnotation.empty(a))
874         return om;
875      om = newMap(om);
876      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
877      // @formatter:off
878      return om
879         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(a.description()))
880         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_url, a.url())
881      ;
882      // @formatter:on
883   }
884
885   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, Header[] a) {
886      if (a.length == 0)
887         return om;
888      om = newMap(om);
889      for (var aa : a) {
890         var name = StringUtils.firstNonEmpty(aa.name(), aa.value());
891         if (isEmpty(name))
892            throw iaex("@Header used without name or value.");
893         merge(om.getMap(name, true), aa.schema());
894      }
895      return om;
896   }
897
898   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, Items a) throws ParseException {
899      if (ItemsAnnotation.empty(a))
900         return om;
901      om = newMap(om);
902      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
903      Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Shorts::ine;
904      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Shorts::ine;
905      Predicate<Boolean> nf = ObjectUtils::isTrue;
906      Predicate<Long> nm1 = Shorts::nm1;
907      // @formatter:off
908      return om
909         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_collectionFormat, a.collectionFormat(), a.cf())
910         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_default, joinnl(a.default_(), a.df()))
911         .appendFirst(nec, SWAGGER_enum, toSet(a.enum_()), toSet(a.e()))
912         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_format, a.format(), a.f())
913         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum, a.exclusiveMaximum() || a.emax())
914         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum, a.exclusiveMinimum() || a.emin())
915         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_items, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_items), a.items()))
916         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_maximum, a.maximum(), a.max())
917         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxItems, a.maxItems(), a.maxi())
918         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxLength, a.maxLength(), a.maxl())
919         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_minimum, a.minimum(), a.min())
920         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minItems, a.minItems(), a.mini())
921         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minLength, a.minLength(), a.minl())
922         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_multipleOf, a.multipleOf(), a.mo())
923         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_pattern, a.pattern(), a.p())
924         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_uniqueItems, a.uniqueItems() || a.ui())
925         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_type, a.type(), a.t())
926         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_$ref, a.$ref())
927      ;
928      // @formatter:on
929   }
930
931   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, Response a) throws ParseException {
932      if (ResponseAnnotation.empty(a))
933         return om;
934      om = newMap(om);
935      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Shorts::ine;
936      if (! SchemaAnnotation.empty(a.schema()))
937         merge(om, a.schema());
938      // @formatter:off
939      return om
940         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_examples, parseMap(a.examples()))
941         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_headers, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_headers), a.headers()))
942         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_schema, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_schema), a.schema()))
943      ;
944      // @formatter:on
945   }
946
947   @SuppressWarnings({
948      "removal" // Uses deprecated exclusiveMaximum/exclusiveMinimum for backward compatibility
949   })
950   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, Schema a) {
951      try {
952         if (SchemaAnnotation.empty(a))
953            return om;
954         om = newMap(om);
955         Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
956         Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Shorts::ine;
957         Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Shorts::ine;
958         Predicate<Boolean> nf = ObjectUtils::isTrue;
959         Predicate<Long> nm1 = Shorts::nm1;
960         // @formatter:off
961         return om
962            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_allOf, joinnl(a.allOf()))
963            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_collectionFormat, a.collectionFormat(), a.cf())
964            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_default, joinnl(a.default_(), a.df()))
965            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_discriminator, a.discriminator())
966            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(a.description(), a.d()))
967            .appendFirst(nec, SWAGGER_enum, toSet(a.enum_()), toSet(a.e()))
968            .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum, a.exclusiveMaximum() || a.emax())
969            .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum, a.exclusiveMinimum() || a.emin())
970            .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_externalDocs, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_externalDocs), a.externalDocs()))
971            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_format, a.format(), a.f())
972            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_ignore, a.ignore() ? SWAGGER_true : null)
973            .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_items, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_items), a.items()))
974            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_maximum, a.maximum(), a.max())
975            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxItems, a.maxItems(), a.maxi())
976            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxLength, a.maxLength(), a.maxl())
977            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxProperties, a.maxProperties(), a.maxp())
978            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_minimum, a.minimum(), a.min())
979            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minItems, a.minItems(), a.mini())
980            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minLength, a.minLength(), a.minl())
981            .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minProperties, a.minProperties(), a.minp())
982            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_multipleOf, a.multipleOf(), a.mo())
983            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_pattern, a.pattern(), a.p())
984            .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_readOnly, a.readOnly() || a.ro())
985            .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_required, a.required() || a.r())
986            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_summary, resolve(firstNonEmpty(a.summary(), a.su())))
987            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_title, a.title())
988            .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_type, a.type(), a.t())
989            .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_uniqueItems, a.uniqueItems() || a.ui())
990            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_xml, joinnl(a.xml()))
991            .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_$ref, a.$ref())
992         ;
993         // @formatter:on
994      } catch (ParseException e) {
995         throw iaex(e);
996      }
997   }
998
999   private MarshalledMap merge(MarshalledMap om, SubItems a) throws ParseException {
1000      if (SubItemsAnnotation.empty(a))
1001         return om;
1002      om = newMap(om);
1003      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
1004      Predicate<Collection<?>> nec = Shorts::ine;
1005      Predicate<Boolean> nf = ObjectUtils::isTrue;
1006      Predicate<Long> nm1 = Shorts::nm1;
1007      // @formatter:off
1008      return om
1009         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_collectionFormat, a.collectionFormat(), a.cf())
1010         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_default, joinnl(a.default_(), a.df()))
1011         .appendFirst(nec, SWAGGER_enum, toSet(a.enum_()), toSet(a.e()))
1012         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum, a.exclusiveMaximum() || a.emax())
1013         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum, a.exclusiveMinimum() || a.emin())
1014         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_format, a.format(), a.f())
1015         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_maximum, a.maximum(), a.max())
1016         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxItems, a.maxItems(), a.maxi())
1017         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_maxLength, a.maxLength(), a.maxl())
1018         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_minimum, a.minimum(), a.min())
1019         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minItems, a.minItems(), a.mini())
1020         .appendFirst(nm1, SWAGGER_minLength, a.minLength(), a.minl())
1021         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_multipleOf, a.multipleOf(), a.mo())
1022         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_pattern, a.pattern(), a.p())
1023         .appendFirst(ne, SWAGGER_type, a.type(), a.t())
1024         .appendIf(nf, SWAGGER_uniqueItems, a.uniqueItems() || a.ui())
1025         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_$ref, a.$ref())
1026      ;
1027      // @formatter:on
1028   }
1029
1030   private MarshalledList parseList(Object o, String location, Object...locationArgs) throws ParseException {
1031      try {
1032         if (o == null)
1033            return null;
1034         var s = (o instanceof String[] stringArray ? joinnl(stringArray) : o.toString());
1035         if (s.isEmpty())
1036            return null;
1037         s = resolve(s);
1038         if (! isProbablyJsonArray(s, true))
1039            s = "[" + s + "]";
1040         return Json5List.ofString(s);
1041      } catch (ParseException e) {
1042         throw new SwaggerException(e, "Malformed swagger JSON array encountered in " + location + ".", locationArgs);
1043      }
1044   }
1045
1046   private MarshalledList parseListOrCdl(Object o, String location, Object...locationArgs) throws ParseException {
1047      try {
1048         if (o == null)
1049            return null;
1050         var s = (o instanceof String[] stringArray ? joinnl(stringArray) : o.toString());
1051         if (s.isEmpty())
1052            return null;
1053         s = resolve(s);
1054         return Json5List.ofJson5OrCdl(s);
1055      } catch (ParseException e) {
1056         throw new SwaggerException(e, "Malformed swagger JSON array encountered in " + location + ".", locationArgs);
1057      }
1058   }
1059
1060   private MarshalledMap parseMap(Object o) throws ParseException {
1061      if (o == null)
1062         return null;
1063      if (o instanceof String[] stringArray)
1064         o = joinnl(stringArray);
1065      if (o instanceof String o2) {
1066         if (o2.isEmpty())
1067            return null;
1068         o2 = resolve(o2);
1069         if (CONST_IGNORE.equalsIgnoreCase(o2))
1070            return Json5Map.of(SWAGGER_ignore, true);
1071         if (! isProbablyJsonObject(o2, true))
1072            o2 = "{" + o2 + "}";
1073         return Json5Map.ofString(o2);
1074      }
1075      if (o instanceof Json5Map o2)
1076         return o2;
1077      if (o instanceof MarshalledMap o2)
1078         return new Json5Map(o2);
1079      throw new SwaggerException(null, "Unexpected data type ''{0}''.  Expected Map or String.", cn(o));
1080   }
1081
1082   private MarshalledMap parseMap(String o, String location, Object...args) throws ParseException {
1083      try {
1084         return parseMap(o);
1085      } catch (ParseException e) {
1086         throw new SwaggerException(e, "Malformed swagger JSON object encountered in " + location + ".", args);
1087      }
1088   }
1089
1090   private MarshalledMap parseMap(String[] o, String location, Object...args) throws ParseException {
1091      if (o.length == 0)
1092         return Json5Map.EMPTY_MAP;
1093      try {
1094         return parseMap(o);
1095      } catch (ParseException e) {
1096         throw new SwaggerException(e, "Malformed swagger JSON object encountered in " + location + ".", args);
1097      }
1098   }
1099
1100   private static MarshalledMap pushupSchemaFields(RestPartType type, MarshalledMap param, MarshalledMap schema) {
1101      // @formatter:off
1102      Predicate<Object> ne = Shorts::ine;
1103      if (nn(schema) && ! schema.isEmpty()) {
1104         if (type == BODY || type == RESPONSE) {
1105            param
1106               .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, schema.remove(SWAGGER_description));
1107         } else {
1108            param
1109               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_collectionFormat, schema.remove(SWAGGER_collectionFormat))
1110               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_default, schema.remove(SWAGGER_default))
1111               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, schema.remove(SWAGGER_description))
1112               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_enum, schema.remove(SWAGGER_enum))
1113               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_example, schema.remove(SWAGGER_example))
1114               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum, schema.remove(SWAGGER_exclusiveMaximum))
1115               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum, schema.remove(SWAGGER_exclusiveMinimum))
1116               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_format, schema.remove(SWAGGER_format))
1117               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_items, schema.remove(SWAGGER_items))
1118               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_maximum, schema.remove(SWAGGER_maximum))
1119               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_maxItems, schema.remove(SWAGGER_maxItems))
1120               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_maxLength, schema.remove(SWAGGER_maxLength))
1121               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_minimum, schema.remove(SWAGGER_minimum))
1122               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_minItems, schema.remove(SWAGGER_minItems))
1123               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_minLength, schema.remove(SWAGGER_minLength))
1124               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_multipleOf, schema.remove(SWAGGER_multipleOf))
1125               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_pattern, schema.remove(SWAGGER_pattern))
1126               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_required, schema.remove(SWAGGER_required))
1127               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_type, schema.remove(SWAGGER_type))
1128               .appendIfAbsentIf(ne, SWAGGER_uniqueItems, schema.remove(SWAGGER_uniqueItems));
1129
1130            if (SWAGGER_object.equals(param.getString(SWAGGER_type)) && ! schema.isEmpty())
1131               param.put(SWAGGER_schema, schema);
1132         }
1133      }
1134
1135      return param;
1136      // @formatter:on
1137   }
1138
1139   private MarshalledList resolve(MarshalledList om) throws ParseException {
1140      var ol2 = new Json5List();
1141      for (var val : om) {
1142         if (val instanceof MarshalledMap val2) {
1143            val = resolve(val2);
1144         } else if (val instanceof MarshalledList val2) {
1145            val = resolve(val2);
1146         } else if (val instanceof String val2) {
1147            val = resolve(val2);
1148         }
1149         ol2.add(val);
1150      }
1151      return ol2;
1152   }
1153
1154   private MarshalledMap resolve(MarshalledMap om) throws ParseException {
1155      MarshalledMap om2 = null;
1156      if (om.containsKey(CONST_value)) {
1157         om = om.modifiable();
1158         om2 = parseMap(om.remove(CONST_value));
1159      } else {
1160         om2 = new Json5Map();
1161      }
1162      for (var e : om.entrySet()) {
1163         var val = e.getValue();
1164         if (val instanceof MarshalledMap val2) {
1165            val = resolve(val2);
1166         } else if (val instanceof MarshalledList val2) {
1167            val = resolve(val2);
1168         } else if (val instanceof String val2) {
1169            val = resolve(val2);
1170         }
1171         om2.put(e.getKey(), val);
1172      }
1173      return om2;
1174   }
1175
1176   private String resolve(String s) {
1177      if (s == null)
1178         return null;
1179      return vr.resolve(s.trim());
1180   }
1181
1182   private String resolve(String[]...s) {
1183      for (var ss : s) {
1184         if (ss.length != 0)
1185            return resolve(joinnl(ss));
1186      }
1187      return null;
1188   }
1189
1190   private MarshalledMap resolveRef(MarshalledMap m) {
1191      if (m == null)
1192         return null;
1193      if (m.containsKey(SWAGGER_$ref) && nn(js.getBeanDefs())) {
1194         var ref = m.getString(SWAGGER_$ref);
1195         if (ref.startsWith("#/definitions/"))
1196            return js.getBeanDefs().get(ref.substring(14));
1197      }
1198      return m;
1199   }
1200
1201   private MarshalledList toList(Tag[] aa) {
1202      if (aa.length == 0)
1203         return null;
1204      var ol = new Json5List();
1205      for (var a : aa)
1206         ol.add(toMap(a));
1207      return nullIfEmpty(ol);
1208   }
1209
1210   private MarshalledMap toMap(Contact a) {
1211      if (ContactAnnotation.empty(a))
1212         return null;
1213      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
1214      // @formatter:off
1215      var om = Json5Map.create()
1216         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_name, resolve(a.name()))
1217         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_url, resolve(a.url()))
1218         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_email, resolve(a.email()));
1219      // @formatter:on
1220      return nullIfEmpty(om);
1221   }
1222
1223   private MarshalledMap toMap(ExternalDocs a) {
1224      if (ExternalDocsAnnotation.empty(a))
1225         return null;
1226      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
1227      // @formatter:off
1228      var om = Json5Map.create()
1229         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(joinnl(a.description())))
1230         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_url, resolve(a.url()));
1231      // @formatter:on
1232      return nullIfEmpty(om);
1233   }
1234
1235   private MarshalledMap toMap(License a) {
1236      if (LicenseAnnotation.empty(a))
1237         return null;
1238      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
1239      // @formatter:off
1240      var om = Json5Map.create()
1241         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_name, resolve(a.name()))
1242         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_url, resolve(a.url()));
1243      // @formatter:on
1244      return nullIfEmpty(om);
1245   }
1246
1247   private MarshalledMap toMap(Tag a) {
1248      var om = Json5Map.create();
1249      Predicate<String> ne = Shorts::ine;
1250      Predicate<Map<?,?>> nem = Shorts::ine;
1251      // @formatter:off
1252      om
1253         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_name, resolve(a.name()))
1254         .appendIf(ne, SWAGGER_description, resolve(joinnl(a.description())))
1255         .appendIf(nem, SWAGGER_externalDocs, merge(om.getMap(SWAGGER_externalDocs), toMap(a.externalDocs())));
1256      // @formatter:on
1257      return nullIfEmpty(om);
1258   }
1259
1260   private static Optional<String> findAnnotationName(AnnotationProvider ap, Class<? extends java.lang.annotation.Annotation> type, ParameterInfo pi) {
1261      // @formatter:off
1262      return ap.find(type, pi)
1263         .stream()
1264         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
1265         .filter(x -> {
1266            var nv = getNameValue(x);
1267            return isAnyNotBlank(nv[0], nv[1]);
1268         })
1269         .findFirst()
1270         .map(x -> {
1271            var nv = getNameValue(x);
1272            return firstNonBlank(nv[0], nv[1]);
1273         });
1274      // @formatter:on
1275   }
1276
1277   private static String[] getNameValue(java.lang.annotation.Annotation a) {
1278      if (a instanceof Query a2) return new String[]{a2.name(), a2.value()};
1279      if (a instanceof Header a2) return new String[]{a2.name(), a2.value()};
1280      if (a instanceof FormData a2) return new String[]{a2.name(), a2.value()};
1281      if (a instanceof Path a2) return new String[]{a2.name(), a2.value()};
1282      return new String[]{"", ""};
1283   }
1284
1285   private static Set<String> toSet(String[] ss) {
1286      if (ss.length == 0)
1287         return null;
1288      Set<String> set = set();
1289      for (var s : ss)
1290         split(s, set::add);
1291      return set.isEmpty() ? null : set;
1292   }
1293}
